title: taraxacum dissectum
intro: Taraxacum dissectum, also known as the Welsh dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, containing compounds such as sesquiterpene lactones and polyphenols, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum dissectum include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed for their medicinal properties.
